gatherWood.description: Find and mine the nearest oak/birch log, collecting it into inventory

craftPlanks.description: Craft any type of logs into planks

craftCraftingTable.description: Craft a crafting table from any type of planks

craftWoodenPickaxe.description: Craft a wooden pickaxe (requires crafting table placed nearby)

mineStone.description: Mine stone blocks to get cobblestone (requires pickaxe equipped)

eatFood.description: Eat the first available food item from inventory

buildShelter.description: Build a small 3x3x3 dirt shelter around the current position

exploreForward.description: Sprint forward for several seconds, exploring new terrain
